title: Anthropic, Gates Foundation launch $200 million partnership for AI in health, education
description: Anthropic and the Gates Foundation have teamed up to allocate $200 million over the span of four years, with the goal of advancing artificial intelligence for the greater good. This initiative is set to boost AI capabilities in African languages and develop knowledge graphs tailored for teachers, enhancing educational outcomes.

title: TSMC says global chip market to hit $1.5 trillion by 2030 as AI drives growth
description: Artificial intelligence (AI) and high-performance computing are expected to account for 55 percent of the $1.5-trillion market, followed by smartphones with 20 percent and automotive applications with 10 percent, according to TSMC.
content: HSINCHU, Taiwan — Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (TSMC), the world’s largest contract chipmaker, expects the global semiconductor market to exceed $1.5 trillion by 2030, topping its previous forecast of $1 trillion, according to its presentat... [2075 chars]

title: Audio clip of Thai PM on reopening border ‘AI’
description: BANGKOK — Thailand’s Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul has rejected an audio clip of him purportedly promising to reopen border crossings with Cambodia as false and “obviously” artificial intelligence (AI)-generated.
content:

title: US clears H200 chip sales to 10 China firms as Nvidia CEO looks for breakthrough
description: THE US has cleared around 10 Chinese firms to buy Nvidia’s second-most powerful artificial intelligence (AI) chip, the H200, but not a single delivery has been made so far, three people familiar with the matter said, leaving a major technology deal in limbo as CEO Jensen Huang seeks a breakthrough in China this week.
